des: Jose Fernandez grounds out, third baseman Kyle Farmer to first baseman Matt Olson.
Jose Fernandez grounds out, third baseman Austin Riley to first baseman Matt Olson.
Jose Fernandez lines out sharply to center fielder Parker Meadows.
Jose Fernandez grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Colt Keith. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Jose Fernandez out at 1st.
Jose Fernandez flies out to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Jose Fernandez homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Jose Fernandez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Colt Keith.
Jose Fernandez homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Alek Thomas scores.
